response.original_title: 1-866-216-0631 How do I recover my Onchain wallet account?
response.overview: If you need ⭐1-(866)-216-0631 help with your Onchain wallet, you⭐1-(866)-216-0631 can contact customer support through the official support channels. Open the ⭐1-(866)-216-0631 Onchain app and use the in-app support chat for the fastest assistance. You can also visit the Help Center for guides, troubleshooting articles, and answers ⭐1-(866)-216-0631 to common questions. For account-related issues, security concerns⭐1-(866)-216-0631, or transaction inquiries, submit a support request through the official support page and a support representative will assist you. Always use official⭐1-(866)-216-0631 Onchain channels to protect your account and personal information.  To recover your self-custody "Onchain" (or non-custodial) wallet, you will use the 12- or 24-word recovery phrase created when the wallet was first set up.
